overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walking tour through Night City's urban districts. The player moves from a covered pedestrian area beneath an elevated highway, up stairs to open streets lined with palm trees, through intersections with Asian-inspired neon architecture, and along commercial sidewalks with massive digital billboards and graffiti-covered walls.

events.description: passing by green-lit food stall with vendor visible inside

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway beneath concrete overpass, navigating between pillars and pedestrians

pedestrian in dark clothing walking in same direction as camera

large structural support columns lining the walkway
food vendor stall with intense green fluorescent lighting and white fabric curtains
rectangular concrete containers with small vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated highway, characterized by massive concrete pillars and a dark overpass deck overhead. The player walks forward past a food stall illuminated by striking green neon lights, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in opposing directions. The environment feels urban and slightly gritty, with digital billboards visible in the distant background through the structure.

emerging from shadow into bright daylight at top of stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing wide concrete stairs with metal railings to exit the covered walkway into open air

intense morning daylight visible at the top of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a wide concrete stairway that transitions from the dark, covered walkway below to the bright street level above. The lighting shifts dramatically from shadow to intense daylight as the camera approaches the top of the stairs, where palm trees and an elevated highway curve become visible against the morning sky.

segments.scene_description: Emerging into open air, the scene reveals a wide urban street bathed in morning sunlight, with tall palm trees lining the left side and a massive curved elevated highway dominating the right. The player walks along the sidewalk past futuristic skyscrapers in the distance, with sparse pedestrian activity and a yellow food cart visible on the right.

large green metal dumpster on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a street intersection, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic while a black car approaches. Turning the corner reveals a distinct architectural shift to Asian-inspired design, with a temple-like gate featuring red pillars and green neon trim, red paper lanterns hanging overhead, and prominent white gang graffiti painted on the asphalt.

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the shadow of a straight elevated highway deck, the player moves along a sidewalk bordered by a construction wall covered in vibrant graffiti art. The lighting becomes diffused and cooler under the overpass. In the distance, a large digital billboard displays an animated cat face with the text CANT BREATHE, while pedestrians walk ahead on the path.

approaching Asian restaurant entrance with red hanging lantern

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a dense commercial district dominated by massive digital billboards, including a prominent curved screen showing an animated pink-haired character. The player walks past storefronts with bright cyan and purple neon displays, ending at the entrance of an Asian restaurant marked by a traditional red paper lantern hanging above the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty, shadowed underpass into a bright, sun-drenched urban district with distinct cultural architecture. It begins in a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive concrete highway, passing a green neon-lit food stall amidst a flow of city pedestrians. As the camera ascends a wide concrete stairway, the lighting shifts dramatically from deep shadow to intense morning daylight, revealing palm trees and the curve of the overpass above. The scene then opens into a wide, sunlit street lined with skyscrapers and a yellow food cart before the camera crosses a busy intersection. Finally, the environment transforms as the player turns a corner, shifting toward Asian-inspired architecture featuring red pillars, hanging lanterns, and white graffiti painted across the asphalt.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the shadowed underbelly of a highway into the vibrant, neon-drenched heart of a commercial district. It begins beneath the cool, diffused light of an elevated highway deck, moving along a sidewalk bordered by graffiti-covered construction walls and a distant digital billboard of an animated cat. As the camera advances, the oppressive shadow of the overpass gives way to a dense urban corridor dominated by massive, glowing screens, including a prominent curved display featuring a pink-haired character. The environment then shifts into a saturated palette of cyan and purple neon as the player passes bright storefronts, finally coming to a halt at the entrance of an Asian restaurant marked by a traditional red paper lantern.
